name: ruby-webrobots
title: ruby-webrobots
summary: Library for creating robots.txt-aware web robots
description:
Library for creating robots.txt-aware web robots
This library helps write robots.txt-compliant web robots in Ruby,
based on Nokogiri's functionality.
